children.name: hwVplsLdpQosStatisticTable
children.description:
This table contains the VPLS LDP's traffic statistic, 
                based on VSI LDP's peer and QoS.

children.name: hwVplsAcSuppStatisticsTable
children.description: This table contains the VPLS-AC's suppresssion Traffic Statistic.

children.name: hwVplsBgpMHPwSuppStatisticsTable
children.description: This table contains the VPLS-BGP-MH-PW's suppresssion Traffic Statistic.

children.name: hwVplsStateChangeReason
children.description: This object indicates the reason of VC state change.

children.name: hwL2vpnTunnelIndex
children.description:
This object indicates the mplsTunnelIndex.
                It contains an unused value for
                mplsTunnelIndex, or a zero to indicate
                that none exist. Negative values are not allowed,
                as they do not correspond to valid values of
                mplsTunnelIndex.

                Note that this object offers an unused value
                for an mplsTunnelIndex value at the ingress
                side of a tunnel. At other LSRs the value
                of mplsTunnelIndex SHOULD be taken from the
                value signaled by the MPLS signaling protocol.

children.name: hwVplsAdPwSuppStatisticsTable
children.description: This table contains the VPLS-AD-PW's suppresssion Traffic Statistic.

children.name: hwVplsAdPwSuppStatisticsEntry
children.description: Provides the information of the VPLS-AD-PW's suppresssion Traffic Statistic.

children.name: hwVplsAdPwSuppStatRemoteIpAddr
children.description: This object indicates the IP address of the remote end.

children.name: hwVplsAdPwSuppStatBroDropPpsRate
children.description: The broadcast rate of pps dropped from PW.

children.name: hwVplsAdPwSuppStatMulDropPpsRate
children.description: The multicast rate of pps dropped from PW.

children.name: hwVplsAdPwSuppStatUnkPassBpsRate
children.description: The unknown-unicast rate of bps passed from PW.
